top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Open Book Review of Northern Ireland Executive Budget
top_signals.summary: Review into Northern Ireland Executive Finances presenting options for the Executive to consider to put finances on sustainable footing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rubio odds for GOP 2028 nominee close to overtaking Vance on Kalshi
top_signals.summary: Vice President Vance has seen his odds slip since the start of the year, as the secretary of State's chances have been buoyed by international conflicts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Not ‘just a gun’: New SOCOM rifle allows barrel swapping and cartridge changes
top_signals.summary: At SOCOM’s request, the rifle features a swappable barrel, allowing operators to change between legacy cartridges and the newer 6.5mm Creedmoor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: ‘Be more Trumpian’ – Mandelson discussed dire economy and ‘lack of verve’ with key Starmer ally
top_signals.summary: One of Keir Starmer’s closest allies hit out at Downing Street’s thinking on economic policy as he complained about the government’s push to tax people to pay for more benefits, the latest Mandelson files have revealed.  Pat McFadden told Peter Mandelson in May last year that meetings he attended centred on questions about hiking taxes [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE breakout puts $100 price target in play
top_signals.summary: HYPE has entered the breakout stage of its prevailing bull pennant setup with an upside target near $105, with strong fundamentals backing the bullish case.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Recovery hopes fade as Kelp DAO hacker launders nearly all $220M in stolen funds
top_signals.summary: The Kelp DAO exploiter laundered about $220 million worth of remaining stolen funds in a bid to make them untraceable, excluding the $71 million frozen by Arbitrum’s Security Council.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
